## power-domains

Property name: `power-domains`

Value type: `<prop-encoded-array>` encoded as a list of phandle + power-domain-specifier pairs

A list of phandle and power domain specifier pairs, one pair per power domain consumed by the device.

---

**From binding** (\`arm,cortex-a510\`):

A phandle to the debug power domain if the debug logic has its own
dedicated power domain. CPU idle states may also need to be separately
constrained to keep CPU cores powered.
